case_title: DABRIOU, YVAN VS DAVIS, DOROTHY L

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DAVIS, DOROTHY L IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DABRIOU, YVAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
